channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Taiwan says chipmaker’s move to invest $100 billion in the US wasn’t because of US pressure
item.description: TAIPEI, Taiwan (AP) — Taiwan’s president and top chipmaker TSMC held a joint news conference Thursday to defend the company’s decision to invest $100 billion in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: AI chatbots infected with Russian disinformation: Study
item.description: The world’s most popular artificial intelligence (AI) chatbots are infected with Russian disinformation, according to a study published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: TikTok Deadline Extension Looms: Trump Suggests Consideration Amid Interest in Deal
item.description: President Trump suggests considering a second deadline extension for TikTok ban amid interest in the video-sharing platform and potential China approval of deal.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: LibreOffice Sees Record Downloads Amid Growing Interest in Open-Source Office Suites
item.description: Interest in LibreOffice, the open-source alternative to Microsoft Office, is on the rise with weekly downloads close to 1 million a week.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Seven important trends in the server sphere
item.description: The pace of change around server technology is advancing considerably, driven by hyperscalers but spilling over into the on-premises world as well.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Agentblazer: Salesforce announces agentic AI certification, learning path
item.description: Hot on the heels of the release of Agentforce 2dx for developing, testing, and deploying AI agents, Salesforce on Thursday introduced Agentblazer Status to its Trailhead online learning platform.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tres requisitos imprescindibles a la hora de contratar a proveedores de IA
item.description: Dos años de experimentación con la IA generativa pueden haber dado lugar a varios casos de uso valiosos pero, en este período, los líderes de TI también han aprendido que no hay que lanzarse a ciegas a esta nueva tecnología en rápida evolución.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Salesforce takes on hyperscalers with Agentforce 2dx updates
item.description: Salesforce’s updates to its agentic AI offering — Agentforce — released this week could give the CRM software provider an edge over its enterprise application rivals and hyperscalers including AWS, Google, IBM, Service Now and Microsoft.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: GOP lawmakers balk at Trump’s call to repeal CHIPS Act
item.description: Republican lawmakers on Wednesday said President Trump’s call for Congress to “get rid of” the 2022 CHIPS and Science Act, which provided $52 billion for the domestic semiconductor manufacturing industry, is dead on arrival on Capitol Hill.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, The Hill

item.title: How Trump's tariffs could pinch the tech sector
item.description: The tech industry is set to feel the pinch as the Trump administration levies new tariffs against key U.S. trading partners.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Making mindfulness a leadership success factor
item.description: Many industries are currently undergoing massive change. They are adapting organizationally, introducing modern technologies and developing new business models. This is accompanied by a fundamentally changed working environment and a rethinking of corporate culture.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Ecco come i leader IT si preparano alla grande sfida per la gestione degli agenti AI
item.description: Via via che gli AI agent arriveranno a occupare porzioni sempre più significative dei flussi di lavoro aziendali, i leader IT dovranno affrontare una sfida sempre più complessa: gestirli.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk’s court order against OpenAI gets blocked by federal judge
item.description: A federal judge has denied Elon Musk’s request for a court order blocking OpenAI from converting itself to a for-profit company but said she could expedite a trial to consider Musk’s claims against the ChatGPT maker and its CEO. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: UK watchdog drops competition review of Microsoft's OpenAI deal
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Britain's competition watchdog said Wednesday it has dropped its review of Microsoft's partnership with OpenAI, saying it's satisfied that the deal doesn't need a closer investigation under the country's merger rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: AI pioneers who channeled 'hedonistic' machines win computer science's top prize
item.description: Teaching machines in the way that animal trainers mold the behavior of dogs or horses has been an important method for developing artificial intelligence and one that was recognized Wednesday with the top computer science award.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian joins bid to acquire TikTok
item.description: Reddit co-founder Alexis Ohanian has joined billionaire Frank McCourt’s bid to acquire TikTok as a strategic adviser.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia lawmakers push to ban automated speed cameras near schools
item.description: DECATUR, Ga. (AP) — Outside Beacon Hill Middle School in the Atlanta suburb of Decatur, like along hundreds of roadsides across Georgia, the unblinking eye of a camera tickets drivers who speed through a school zone.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Minnesota considers blocking 'nudify' apps that use AI to make explicit images without consent
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Molly Kelley was stunned to discover in June that someone she knew had used widely available “nudification” technology to create highly realistic and sexually explicit videos and images of her, using family photos that were posted on social media.
item.dc:creator: STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: VMware ESXi gets critical patches for in-the-wild virtual machine escape attack
item.description: Broadcom released emergency patches for its VMware ESXi, Workstation, and Fusion products to fix three vulnerabilities that can lead to virtual machine escape and are actively being exploited by attackers.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft's TypeScript 5.8 Reaches General Availability, Conditional Return Types Dropped
item.description: TypeScript 5.8 is now available with improvements and new features but drops conditional return types feature
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: UK data protection watchdog investigating how TikTok uses children's personal data
item.description: LONDON (AP) — The U.K.'s data protection watchdog said Monday that it's investigating how TikTok uses the personal information of teenagers to deliver content recommendations to them when they use the social media platform.
item.dc:creator: SYLVIA HUI, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The most relevant new features in JDK 24
item.description: Since 2018, we’ve had a new release of the Java platform every six months. With Swiss watch-like regularity, the latest version of Java, JDK 24, is upon us.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Trump announces US crypto reserve
item.description: President Trump announced Sunday that the U.S. would be creating a crypto reserve, to boost the growing industry.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: After rocky history, GSA shuts down 18F office
item.description: Thomas Shedd, the commissioner of Federal Acquisition Service, said the decision is part of the President’s Workforce Optimization Initiative executive order. The post After rocky history, GSA shuts down 18F office first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Chip Ganassi Racing partners with OpenAI in first motorsports venture for AI company
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Chip Ganassi Racing on Friday said it has partnered on a strategic research collaboration with OpenAI — a deal that makes the two-time reigning IndyCar championship winning team the first to bring in a partner from the artificial intelligence field.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Microsoft shutting down Skype in May
item.description: Microsoft is closing down Skype, the video-calling service it bought for $8.5 billion in 2011, which had helped spark a transformation in how people communicate online.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: AI and Data Exchange 2025: IDC’s Max Claps on agencies driving AI into mission areas
item.description: Federal use cases typically fall into one of five “swim lanes,” with most impacting customer or citizen services, said the IDC Insight's federal researcher. The post AI and Data Exchange 2025: IDC’s Max Claps on agencies driving AI into mission areas first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network
